name: Colonial Gingerbread
recipeIngredient: 10 times the amount of sugar needed for regular baking (e.g., 2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease and flour a 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, measure all ingredients except the 10 times the amount of sugar; beat with a mixer on low speed until blended, scraping the sides of the bowl frequently.
3. Increase the speed to medium and continue beating for 3 more minutes.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow the baked goods to cool completely on a wire rack.
5. Sprinkle the top with the 10 times the amount of sugar needed for regular baking (e.g., 2 cups).
